meta.title: ARGO'S PACK - Premium Pet Essentials
meta.description: ARGO'S PACK - Premium products dedicated to your pet's wellness and comfort. Discover our exclusive line, crafted with love for your most faithful companion.
meta.ogDescription: Premium products dedicated to your pet's wellness and comfort. Discover our exclusive line, crafted with love for your most faithful companion.

hero.description: At ARGO'S PACK, we believe every pet deserves the very best. Our products are meticulously crafted with superior quality to ensure the wellness, comfort, and joy of your loyal companion.
hero.imageAlt: Happy pet enjoying ARGO'S PACK products

quality.title: Premium Quality
quality.description: Sourced and rigorously tested to guarantee maximum durability and long-lasting quality.

love.title: Crafted with Love
love.description: Every item is designed with your pet's happiness and ultimate well-being in mind.

innovation.title: Innovation
innovation.description: We blend the latest trends with cutting-edge technology for superior pet care.

safety.title: Uncompromising Safety
safety.description: All our products adhere to the strictest safety and quality standards.

carrier.name: Premium Expandable Travel Carrier
carrier.description: Versatile carrier for cats and small dogs (up to 20lbs) with rechargeable LED light. TSA Airline Approved. Featuring expandable walls, 4 entry points, and plush washable padding.
